case_title: EMDO, INC. DBA PLAZA TRAVEL VS ABPIKAR, HASSAN MR.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $380.90 AS TO DEFENDANT ABPIKAR, HASSAN MR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY EMDO, INC. DBA PLAZA TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT ABPIKAR, HASSAN MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WARNED C.M. ON PO BOX.WILL TRY FOR $5&SHERIFF(S.J.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO HASSAN ABPIKAR RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMDO, INC. DBA PLAZA TRAVEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABPIKAR, HASSAN MR. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,520.00, PLUS $150.00 PUNITIVE DAMAGES FOR STOPPED CHECK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ABPIKAR, HASSAN MR.
